scripts.prepare: bun -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); if (process.env.HUSKY === '0' || !existsSync('.git')) process.exit(0); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const command = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'husky.cmd' : 'husky'; const result = spawnSync(command, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.verify:frontend: bun run --cwd frontend test && bun run --cwd frontend build
scripts.verify:all: bun run verify:rust && cargo test && bun run verify:frontend
